---
title: "Submit Observation"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Please share your observation of white abalone by filling out the:

<a class="btn btn-primary" href="https://forms.gle/9iVE5Do3Vec9UrHU9" target="_blank">Submit survey</a>

Thank you for participating!

![Photo Credit: Kat Magaña/BML](./images/white_ab_adult_Kat_Magana.png)
